  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
  2. AbstractToolParameter

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.AbstractToolParameter

Packages that use AbstractToolParameter
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.

  • Uses of AbstractToolParameter in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi with type parameters of type AbstractToolParameter
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractTool<P extends AbstractToolParameter, C extends AbstractToolCall>
    The abstract base class for a tool, now generic on its Parameter and Call types.

  • Uses of AbstractToolParameter in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad

    Subclasses of AbstractToolParameter in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BadToolParam
    A placeholder parameter for a BadTool.

  • Uses of AbstractToolParameter in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java

    Subclasses of AbstractToolParameter in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JavaMethodToolParameter
    A subclass of AbstractToolParameter that holds Java-specific reflection information, namely the full generic Type of the parameter.
